chapters.title: Before the Call
chapters.content: Emma checked her notes carefully before the client call. It was an important international meeting, and she wanted to answer every question clearly.

chapters.title: The Discussion
chapters.content: The client asked about deadlines, costs, and future plans. Emma listened carefully and explained the next steps with confidence.

chapters.title: Successful Outcome
chapters.content: At the end of the call, the client sounded satisfied. Emma closed her laptop with relief and wrote down the action items for the team.
